Name: Percentage of cases where Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER occurs out of all completed reimbursement processes
Metric: Percentage of 'Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER' out of all 'Payment Handled'

Name: Frequency of Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER in variants that eventually lead to Payment Handled

Metric: Percentage of 'Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER' out of all 'Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR'

Name: Number of times Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER appears in process variants containing a prior rejection (e.g., Declaration REJECTED by ADMINISTRATION or Declaration REJECTED by PRE_APPROVER)

Name: Percentage of cases where Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER is skipped, compared to variants where it is executed

Name: Percentage of Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER that leads directly to Request Payment without further rejections

Name: Percentage of Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER occurring in cases that eventually result in Payment Handled, compared to those that end in rejection

Name: Frequency of Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER in the most common variant (Declaration SUBMITTED by EMPLOYEE → Declaration APPROVED by ADMINISTRATION → Declaration APPROVED by BUDGET OWNER → Declaration FINAL_APPROVED by SUPERVISOR → Request Payment → Payment Handled)
